name: ratings-reviews
summary: Star ratings + reviews on any entity: reviews table + RLS (one per user/target), average+count summary RPC, submit/list hook + stub.
postInstall: Apply supabase/0010_reviews.sql (public-read; one review per user/entity; review_summary() RPC)
supabase db reset && supabase test db
Use useReviews('product', productId) for the average, the list, and submit (upsert).
Replace src/features/reviews/ui/reviews-screen.tsx after the Claude Design pass
